name: AdBliss
description: Unified ad performance data across Meta, Google, TikTok, LinkedIn, Shopify, Stripe, HubSpot, Klaviyo, and more. Query metrics, revenue, and campaign data — or let your agent make optimization recommendations.

apiKey.description: Your AdBliss API key (ab_live_... or ab_test_...). Get one at app.adbliss.io/settings
